steps.title: Write the perimeter
steps.content: The rectangle has length $x+35$ and width $x$, so its perimeter is $$2(x+35)+2x=4x+70$$

steps.title: Translate at least
steps.content: The phrase at least 520 means the perimeter is greater than or equal to $520$: $$4x+70\geq520$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice D has the correct perimeter expression and the correct inequality direction, so D is correct.
